problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
